TakeAim.name: PASSIVE_TAKEAIM_NAME
TakeAim.desc_resolved: Gain +1 range and damage at the start of each turn. You lose this when you move.

2.desc_resolved: Gain +2 range and damage at the start of each turn. You lose this when you move.

TowerDefense.name: PASSIVE_TOWERDEFENSE_NAME
TowerDefense.desc_resolved: When an enemy comes within range, shoot them for 1 damage.

2.desc_resolved: When an enemy comes within range, use your basic attack on them.

HuntersBoon.name: PASSIVE_HUNTERSBOON_NAME
HuntersBoon.desc_resolved: When you kill an enemy, gain 5 mana.

2.desc_resolved: When you kill an enemy, restore all your mana.

BroodMother.name: PASSIVE_BROODMOTHER_NAME
BroodMother.desc_resolved: Your familiars and units you charm gain +2 Damage and +5 HP.

2.desc_resolved: Your familiars and units you charm gain +3 Damage, +10 HP, and inflict Poison.

TaintedMother.name: PASSIVE_TAINTEDMOTHER_NAME
TaintedMother.desc_resolved: Your familiars and units you charm gain +4 [img:spd] and inflict Poison and Bleed.

2.desc_resolved:
Your familiars and units you charm gain +4 [img:spd] and inflict Poison and Bleed.
Start each battle with 4 fly familiars.

Quiver.name: PASSIVE_QUIVER_NAME
Quiver.desc_resolved: Save unused basic attacks for future turns.

2.desc_resolved:
Save unused basic attacks for future turns.
If you haven't attacked this battle, the number you save is doubled.

SplitShot.name: PASSIVE_SPLITSHOT_NAME
SplitShot.desc_resolved: Your basic attack has +1 area but deals 50% less damage.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack has +2 area but deals 50% less damage.

Hazardous.name: PASSIVE_HAZARDOUS_NAME
Hazardous.desc_resolved: Tile damage and effects are doubled.

2.desc_resolved:
Tile damage and effects are doubled.
Allies are immune to tile damage and effects.
Your basic attack spawns brambles in an area.

Traps.name: PASSIVE_TRAPS_NAME
Traps.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack spawns a bear trap if you shoot an empty tile.
Whenever one of your traps triggers, gain +2 [img:dex].

2.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack spawns a bear trap if you shoot an empty tile.
Whenever one of your traps triggers, gain +2 [img:dex] and +1 Bonus Attack.

CatchProjectiles.name: PASSIVE_CATCHPROJECTILES_NAME
CatchProjectiles.desc_resolved: 33% chance to block enemy projectiles and a 100% chance to block allied projectiles. If you block a projectile, gain +1 Bonus Attack.

2.desc_resolved: 50% chance to block enemy projectiles and a 100% chance to block allied projectiles. If you block a projectile, gain +1 Bonus Attack and +1 All Stats Up.

TrickyTraps.name: PASSIVE_TRICKYTRAPS_NAME
TrickyTraps.desc_resolved: Damage and effects from your traps are doubled.

2.desc_resolved:
Damage and effects from your traps are doubled.
Allies don't trigger your traps.

GravityFalls.name: PASSIVE_GRAVITYFALLS_NAME
GravityFalls.desc_resolved: Your basic attack deals +1 damage for each tile you shoot beyond range 3.

2.desc_resolved:
+2 range.
Your basic attack deals +1 damage for each tile you shoot beyond range 3.

HawkEye.name: PASSIVE_BULLSEYE_NAME
HawkEye.desc_resolved:
Your ranged attacks never miss.
+25% critical hit chance.

2.desc_resolved:
Your ranged attacks never miss.
+25% critical hit chance.
Gain +1 [img:lck] each time you make a critical hit.

Spotters.name: PASSIVE_SPOTTERS_NAME
Spotters.desc_resolved: Your basic attack can target tiles adjacent to allies.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack and spells can target tiles adjacent to allies.

LuckSwing.name: PASSIVE_LUCKSWING_NAME
LuckSwing.desc_resolved: +50% critical hit chance but +25% chance to miss.

2.desc_resolved: +50% critical hit chance but +25% chance to miss.

Host.name: PASSIVE_HOST_NAME
Host.desc_resolved: Start each battle with 2 tiny spider familiars. A spider egg parasite is added to your inventory. You can unequip parasites freely.

2.desc_resolved: Start each battle with 2 tiny spider familiars. A spider webber parasite is added to your inventory. You can unequip parasites freely.

Sniper.name: PASSIVE_SNIPER_NAME
Sniper.desc_resolved: Critical hits deal +100% more damage and have a 25% chance to inflict Stun.

2.desc_resolved: Critical hits deal +200% more damage and have a 33% chance to inflict Stun.

RubberArrows.name: PASSIVE_RUBBERARROWS_NAME
RubberArrows.desc_resolved: Your projectiles bounce to another enemy within 3 tiles.

2.desc_resolved: Your projectiles bounce to another enemy within 4 tiles, twice!

TalkToAnimals.name: PASSIVE_TALKTOANIMALS_NAME
TalkToAnimals.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts Charm 5 the first time you use it each battle.

2.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack inflicts Charm 5 the first time you use it each battle.
Your basic attack has a 25% chance to inflict Charm 1.

AnimalControl.name: PASSIVE_ANIMALCONTROL_NAME
AnimalControl.desc_resolved: Your basic attack causes units to immediately attack an enemy in range.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack causes units to immediately attack an enemy in range. Your basic attack can heal allies.

SleepDarts.name: PASSIVE_SLEEPDARTS_NAME
SleepDarts.desc_resolved: At the start of each battle, you and all allies that don't have weapons gains a temporary Sleep Dart.

2.desc_resolved: At the start of each battle, you and all allies that don't have weapons gains a temporary Sleep Dart with 2 uses.

Survivalist.name: PASSIVE_SURVIVALIST_NAME
Survivalist.desc_resolved:
4 healing consumables and a full water bottle are added to your inventory.
You can use consumables on allies.
Store +2 food at the end of each battle.

2.desc_resolved:
4 large healing consumables are added to your inventory.
You can use consumables on allies.
Store +20 food at the end of each battle.

Fleabag.name: PASSIVE_FLEABAG_NAME
Fleabag.desc_resolved: At the end of your turn, spawn Flea familiars equal to the number of enemies you've killed this battle.

2.desc_resolved: At the end of your turn, spawn Flea familiars equal to the number of enemies you've killed this battle plus two.

ThrillOfTheHunt.name: PASSIVE_THRILLOFTHEHUNT_NAME
ThrillOfTheHunt.desc_resolved: At the end of each battle, if you killed at least 3 enemies, gain +1 [img:dex] permanently and find a random consumable item.

2.desc_resolved: At the end of each battle, if you killed at least 3 enemies, gain +1 [img:dex] permanently and find a random consumable item. +1 Range and +1 Health Regeneration for every 5 [img:dex] you have.
